params.name: sort
params.description: Field to sort results by.

params.name: after
params.description: The cursor for pagination to get the next page of results.

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of results to return per page.

params.name: createdAt
params.description: Filter pages created at this timestamp.

params.name: updatedAt
params.description: Filter pages updated at this timestamp.

params.name: archived
params.description: Whether to return archived pages.

items.docs: Returns a list of site pages in the portal. You can filter by various properties and paginate through results. Both draft and published pages are accessible through this endpoint.
Creates a new site page with the specified content and settings. The new page starts in draft state and must be published to make it publicly accessible.

params.name: objectId
params.description: The ID of the site page to retrieve.

params.name: archived
params.description: Whether to return archived pages.

items.docs: Returns the details of a specific site page by its ID, including content, SEO settings, publish state, and metadata.

params.name: objectId
params.description: The ID of the site page to update.

items.docs: Performs a partial update of a site page. Only the properties included in the request body will be updated. Changes are applied to the draft version and must be published.

params.name: objectId
params.description: The ID of the site page to delete.

items.docs: Archives (soft deletes) a site page by its ID. Archived pages are no longer publicly accessible but can be restored using the HubSpot UI.

params.name: objectId
params.description: The ID of the site page to publish.

items.docs: Publishes the draft version of a site page, making all pending content changes live and publicly accessible. After publishing, the page becomes visible at its URL.

params.name: sort
params.description: Field to sort results by.

params.name: after
params.description: The cursor for pagination to get the next page of results.

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of results to return per page.

params.name: createdAt
params.description: Filter landing pages created at this timestamp.

params.name: updatedAt
params.description: Filter landing pages updated at this timestamp.

params.name: archived
params.description: Whether to return archived landing pages.

items.docs: Returns a list of landing pages in the portal. You can filter by various properties and paginate through results. Both draft and published landing pages are accessible.
Creates a new landing page with the specified content and settings. The new landing page starts in draft state and must be published to make it publicly accessible.

params.name: objectId
params.description: The ID of the landing page to retrieve.

params.name: archived
params.description: Whether to return archived landing pages.

items.docs: Returns the details of a specific landing page by its ID, including content, form connections, SEO settings, and publish state.

params.name: objectId
params.description: The ID of the landing page to delete.

items.docs: Archives (soft deletes) a landing page by its ID. Archived landing pages are no longer publicly accessible but can be restored using the HubSpot UI.
